rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE AMENDED AND RESTATED MALEE TANG TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/31/24 to be heard with the related accounting. This accounting has not yet been reviewed: (1) no proposed order has been submitted; (2) no courtesy copies have been provided or received by the assigned examiner; (3) original bank statements do not appear to have been filed; (4) proof of the additional bond must be filed before an accounting can be approved; and (5) beneficiaries of the trust do not appear to have been identified in the pleading, as required by CRC 7.902. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SUZANNE CASTLE TRUST DATED APRIL 22, 2009
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For Order To Set Aside Amendment Of Trust, And Invalidate Will Due To (1) Undue Influence, (2) Lack Of Testamentary Capacity, And (3) Elder Abuse; Remove Trustee; Compel Trustee To Provide All Trust Documents And Accounting; Impose Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/29/25 in light of new objections just filed on 12/2/24 (not yet e-filed). (No earlier date available.) The following issues with the petition must also be addressed well before that hearing. 1) The addresses of the persons whose addresses were previously unknown (Javier Rodriguez and Josephina Alaniz) have not been set forth in a verified supplement such that the Court can determine that notice to them was correct. 2) The "supplement" filed on 10/14/24 amended the petition. No notice has been given of this erroneously captioned pleading not filed at least 30 days before the 10/21/24 hearing. [Please review CRC 7.3 for the distinction between a supplement and an amendment and CRC 7.53 regarding notice for an amendment vs. a supplement.) Deadline is 1/15/25 to provide courtesy copies to the assigned examiner. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. [LRSF 14.7 B. and C.])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RALPH PATRICK SAXON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will dated 10/27/99. [Probate Code Section 8225.] No appearance is required. Status hearing will be set for 12/22/2025. If a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is filed at least two weeks before 12/22/2025, no appearance will be required on that date. (NB: Do not forget to attach a typed version of a holographic will to any pleading that has a copy of the holographic will attached to it, including a Proof of Holographic Instrument.)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE MARRIAGE OF BENJAMIN JOSE LANZARIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared or addressed: (1) Petition does not allege why this petition is necessary. Petition #3.a or b to be affirmed. A verified supplement needs to be filed to set forth the information. (2) Petition does not present sufficient supporting information or material for the court to establish the fact of the marriage. The only material presented is a copy of a certificate of marriage recently issued by the church. Need more information to support the marriage. For example, when/where the ceremony took place. Photos. A written declaration from the person who performed it. Witnesses' statements describing the ceremony regarding the marriage or ceremony. (3) Proposed order must be completed except for the judge's signature line. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
